## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related

Issue:

## Testing

Describe what you ran to validate the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not bundle unrelated work
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] `make test` and `make lint` were run locally, or I explained why not
- [ ] Docs, examples, or changelog entries were updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue and RFC when required
